findings.title: SQL Injection vulnerability
findings.description: User input 'user_id' is directly interpolated into SQL query without sanitization, allowing SQL injection attacks
findings.fix: Use parameterized queries: query = 'SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = %s' and db.execute(query, (user_id,))

metadata.response_content: {"findings": [{"severity": "CRITICAL", "cwe_id": "CWE-89", "title": "SQL Injection vulnerability", "line_number": 2, "description": "User input 'user_id' is directly interpolated into SQL query without sanitization, allowing SQL injection attacks", "fix": "Use parameterized queries: query = 'SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = %s' and db.execute(query, (user_id,))"}], "risk_level": "CRITICAL", "recommendation": "BLOCK"}
